Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.estimators.CircleRobustEstimator

  • Packages that use CircleRobustEstimator 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures

    • Uses of CircleRobustEstimator in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Subclasses of CircleRobustEstimator in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  LMedSCircleRobustEstimator
      Finds the best circle for provided collection of 2D points using LMedS algorithm.
      class  MSACCircleRobustEstimator
      Finds the best circle for provided collection of 2D points using MSAC algorithm.
      class  PROMedSCircleRobustEstimator
      Finds the best circle for provided collection of 2D points using PROMedS algorithm.
      class  PROSACCircleRobustEstimator
      Finds the best circle for provided collection of 2D points using PROSAC algorithm.
      class  RANSACCircleRobustEstimator
      Finds the best circle for provided collection of 2D points using RANSAC algorithm.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that return CircleRobustEstimator 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create()
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using default robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using default robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and default robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and default estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points and default robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points and default estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(CircleRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Point2D> points, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided listener and points.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Point2D> points)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided points and default robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Point2D> points, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided points and default estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Point2D> points, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided points and robust estimator method.
      static CircleRobustEstimator CircleRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Point2D> points, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a circle robust estimator based on 2D point samples and using provided points and robust estimator method.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators with parameters of type CircleRobustEstimator 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void CircleRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateEnd​(CircleRobustEstimator estimator)
      Called when estimation ends.
      void CircleRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateNextIteration​(CircleRobustEstimator estimator, int iteration)
      Called when estimator iterates to refine a possible solution.
      void CircleRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateProgressChange​(CircleRobustEstimator estimator, float progress)
      Called when estimation progress changes significantly.
      void CircleRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateStart​(CircleRobustEstimator estimator)
      Called when estimation starts.
